title: cheirostylis latipetala
intro: Cheirostylis latipetala is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the 'twisted lip orchid'. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cheirostylis latipetala include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Cheirostylis latipetala is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
